qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biotechnology with 3 years experience in Research and Development
qualification.details: Senior Project Associate: M.Sc. in Biotechnology AND 3 years’ experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Senior Project Associate. This is a contractual position within the National Environmental Engineering Research Institute.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Senior Project Associate position in the CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Biotechnology and have at least 3 years of experience in Research and Development to be eligible for the Senior Project Associate position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Project Associate post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Project Associate post will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) in Nagpur, Maharashtra, Pincode: 440020.
